sessions.summary: Triaged 2 defects the bot surfaced on its own review of idx-cdp#44. D2 (CRITICAL): bot flagged its own 60KB diff truncation as a finding, blaming PR authors. Fixed with 4-layer safe-truncation (marker + prompt instruction + file-line post-filter + Slack disclosure) + forged-marker security fix. D1 (HIGH): 'See see inline comments' doubled word. Both merged (#43 aff3307, #44 f7e1b6e), 492 tests. Bot restarted PID 77904, correction note posted to team channel.
done: PM triage: D2 CRITICAL trust defect ships first
D2 4-layer fix + forged-marker security fix, 3-gate review (2 architect rounds)
Architect caught Layer 3 unit mismatch (file-line vs diff-newline) — fixed via cutFileLineMax
D1 See-see fix + doubled-word regression guard across 11 classes
Merged both PRs, batched single bot restart
Architect designed chunk-and-review (token-budgeted batching) as the real follow-up
